title: Grilled Tagine Chicken with Malaysian Delight Sauce
description: A flavorful and aromatic grilled chicken dish inspired by Malaysian cuisine, served with a tangy delight sauce. Perfect for a quick dinner or lunch.
instructions: In a small bowl, mix together Malaysian Delight Sauce, Tagine Spice Blend, and Lime Juice.
Brush chicken breasts with Olive Oil and season with salt and pepper.
Grill chicken for 5-6 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
Meanwhile, grill Spring Onion for 2-3 minutes per side, or until slightly charred.
Serve grilled chicken with Malaysian Delight Sauce, grilled Spring Onion, and a drizzle of Honey.
Garnish with chopped fresh herbs, if desired.
